final:
// // This comment suggests that the OR operation is only performed when reset is HIGH, which is opposite to the actual behavior where the OR operation occurs when reset is LOW.
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input reset,
    output reg out
);always @(a, b, reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            out <= a | b;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests that the OR operation is only performed when reset is HIGH, which is opposite to the actual behavior where the OR operation occurs when reset is LOW.
